DIESEL OIL TANK: 136 CBM

UNPUMPABLE BALLAST WATER: ABT 250MT WOG
CONSTANT: ABT 330 MTS WOG
SPEED & CONSUMPTION:
AT SEA CONSUMPTION:
BALLAST ABOUT 13.0 KNOTS ON ABOUT 19.0 MTS IFO + ABOUT 0.1 MT MGO
LADEN ABOUT 13.0 KNOTS ON ABOUT 20.5 MTS IFO + ABOUT 0.1 MT MGO
ECO SPEEDS:
BALLAST ABOUT 12.0 KNOTS ON ABOUT 16.5 MTS IFO + ABOUT 0.1 MT MGO
LADEN ABOUT 12.0 KNOTS ON ABOUT 17.5 MTS IFO + ABOUT 0.1 MT MGO
BALLAST ABOUT 11.0 KNOTS ON ABOUT 15.0 MTS IFO + ABOUT 0.1 MT MGO
LADEN ABOUT 11.0 KNOTS ON ABOUT 15.0 MTS IFO + ABOUT 0.1 MT MGO
IN PORT CONSUMPTION:
PORT IDLE: ABOUT 2.9 MTS OF IFO + ABOUT 0.1 MT MGO
PORT WORKING: ABOUT 4.9 MTS OF IFO + ABOUT 0.1 MT MGO
SPEED AND CONSUMPTION ARE BASED ON GOOD WEATHER CONDITION BASIS EVEN KEEL. 24 CONSECUTIVE HOURS (FROM NOON TO NOON), NO ADVERSE CURRENT, NO NEGATIVE INFLUENCE OF SWELL, BEAUFORT SCALE 4, DOUGLAS SEA STATE 3 DEFINED AS SIGNIFICANT WAVE HEIGHT UP TO 1.25 METRES. ALWAYS EXCLUDING PERIODS DURING WHICH REDUCTIONS OF SPEED FOR SAFETY, REDUCED VISIBILITY, STEAMING AND/OR MANEUVERING IN CONGESTED WATERS/STRAITS, IN/OUT PORTS ETC. POSITIVE CURRENT SHALL NOT BE USED IN DIMINISHING VESSEL PERFORMANCE.
COST AND TIME (INCLUDING ANY DEVIATION TIME REQUIRED TO MEET SECA REQUIREMENTS AND/OR NATIONAL REGULATIONS IN OPERATION IN PORTS TO WHICH VESSEL IS BOUND) INCL BALLAST EXCHANGE TO BE FOR CHARTERER\'S ACCOUNT. ANY SAVING IN CONSUMPTION MUST BE OFF-SET AGAINST ANY REDUCTION IN SPEED, ANY SAVING IN TIME MUST BE OFF-SET AGAINST ANY EXCESS CONSUMPTION, ANY SAVING IN FO MUST BE OFF-SET AGAINST INCREASED MDO AND VICE VERSA, AND ANY OVERALL SAVING ON INDIVIDUAL PASSAGE(S) MUST BE OFF-SET AGAINST AN OVERALL LOSS ON OTHER INDIVIDUAL PASSAGE(S). VESSEL MAY BURN MDO / MGO / LSMGO IN CASE OF EMERGENCY, DURING MANEUVERING, WHEN NAVIGATING IN NARROW AND/OR SHALLOW AND/OR RESTRICTED WATERS AND/OR IN/OUT OF PORTS AND/OR RIVERS AND IF REQUIRED BY LOCAL AND/OR EMISSION LAWS.
ALL ABOVE FIGURES ARE ABOUT, WHICH MEANS HAVING BOTH AN ALLOWANCE OF 0.5KN ON SPEED AND 5% ON BUNKERS OVER-CONSUMPTION, IN OWNER\'S FAVOUR.
ALL ABOVE FIGURES ARE INCLUSIVE OF AUXILIARY ENGINES.
NO MIXING OF LSFO IS ALLOWED AND BUNKER SUPPLY IS ALLOWED UP TO 85% OF INDIVIDUAL TANK CAPACITY. BUNKER TANK RESERVED FOR ECA COMPLIANT FUEL CANNOT ACCOMMODATE IFO 380 CST.
ALL DETAILS ABOUT / GIVEN TO THE BEST OF OWNERS KNOWLEDGE.
BUNKER SPECIFICATIONS:
LSFO: RMG 380, ISO 8217:2017(E), max 0.5% Sulphur, KV50 min 80cSt
LSMGO: DMA, ISO 8217:2017(E), max 0.1% Sulphur
MAIN ENGINE: B&W MAN 5S50 ME-B9.3
AUX. ENGINE: 3 X ANQING CSSC (6DK-20e) 750Kw
ALL DETAILS ABOUT AND WOG.
